name: ethereum-mastery
description: Complete Ethereum development knowledge base — 18 domains from ETHSkills. Covers shipping, standards, security, tools, wallets, L2s, addresses, concepts, gas, testing, audit, DeFi building blocks, orchestration, indexing, frontend, and QA.

capabilities.security: Defensive Solidity patterns (see solidity-security skill for details)
capabilities.tools: Foundry, Hardhat, RPC endpoints, x402, MCP servers
capabilities.wallets: Account abstraction, multisig, key management, social recovery
capabilities.l2s: Base, Arbitrum, OP Stack, Celo, zkSync — differences and quirks
capabilities.addresses: Verified real contract addresses for major protocols
capabilities.concepts: Mental models: state machines, composability, immutability, trust minimization
capabilities.gas: Real Ethereum gas costs, optimization patterns, EIP-1559
capabilities.testing: Foundry unit/fuzz/fork/invariant (see foundry-testing skill for details)
capabilities.audit: 500+ checklist items across 19 domains (see evm-audit skill for details)
capabilities.building_blocks: DeFi legos: AMMs, lending, vaults, oracles, bridges
capabilities.orchestration: dApp design patterns, transaction sequencing, MEV protection
capabilities.indexing: The Graph, Dune Analytics, event-driven data
capabilities.frontend_ux: On-chain UX patterns, wallet connection, tx feedback
capabilities.qa: QA checklist before shipping to mainnet
capabilities.why_ethereum: Why build on Ethereum — composability, neutrality, security

rules: Consult ethskills BEFORE any on-chain action
Always run security + testing checklists before deployment
Use real addresses from addresses skill — never guess contract addresses
Check gas skill for cost estimation before recommending patterns
L2 skill must be consulted for any non-mainnet deployment (gas, sequencer, quirks)
